title: Erwer's Enderite
description: Enderite -- A new late game tier for items and armor
body:
# Enderite Mod
A small mod adding a new ore similar of netherite  
Sup! This is my first mod, so if you have any feedback please do leave some. ( I am planning to link a github soon! )


## Adds
___
Enderite Ingots  
Enderite Scrap  
Forgotten Debris   
Condensed Endstone

Enderite Tools  
Enderite Armor  

+ 3 Secret Advancements


## 'Lore'
___
First, you must adventure to depths of the nether and return with ancient debris.  
Second, you must see to the city at the end of the game. New rocks form under pressure, condensing the once brittle endstone.  
Third, you must mine the Forgotten Stones of the end.  
Fourth, learn the ways of the cities and combine each of the dimensional ores.  
Fifth, with metal in hand, smith your hellish tools into new astral heights.  


### Incentives
___
So, why not stick to netherite? Well you can, however this mod aims to end an extra challenge. Requiring you to go out of your way and journey through the three dimensions of minecraft. A trophy if you will.


| Piece          | Durability | Armor | Armor Toughness | Knockback Resistance |
| -------------- | ---------- | ----- | --------------- | -------------------- |
| **Helmet**     | 814        | +6    | +6              | +2                   |
| **Chestplate** | 1184       | +12   | +6              | +2                   |
| **Leggings**   | 1110       | +16   | +6              | +2                   |
| **Boots**      | 962        | +6    | +6              | +2                   |

| Tool/Weapon | Durability | Attack Damage | Attack Speed |
| ----------- | ---------- | ------------- | ------------ |
| **Sword**   | 2031       | +12           | 5.2          |
| **Axe**     | 2031       | +13           | 5.6          |
| **Shovel**  | 2031       | +12           | 6.0          |
| **Hoe**     | 2031       | +11           | 12.0         |

Adventure for the rare Void Apple, why?

| Effect / Stat           | 🟡 Golden Apple | 🟣 Enchanted Golden Apple | 🕳️ Void Apple  |
| ----------------------- | --------------- | ------------------------- | ----------------------------------- |
| **Regeneration**        | II (5s)         | II (20s)                  | II (20s)                            |
| **Resistance**          | ❌               | ✅ (5 min)                 | ✅ (5 min)                           |
| **Fire Resistance**     | ❌               | ✅ (5 min)                 | ✅ (5 min)                           |
| **Absorption**          | I (2 hearts)    | IV (8 hearts)             | IV (8 hearts)                       |
| **Speed**               | ❌               | ❌                         | ✅ (Speed IV, 2 min)                 |
| **Saturation (Effect)** | ❌               | ❌                         | ✅ (Sat III, 2 min)                  |

___

End City’s chests now have the additonal items:
- Netherite Ingot  
- Netherite Scrap  
- Enderite Upgrade Template
- Void Apple
